name: zoho_invoice
title: Create a GST Invoice on Zoho
description: Create a professional invoice with multiple line items, GST calculation, client details, and download as PDF.
prompt: Go to Zoho Invoice, create a new invoice for 'Acme Corp' with 3 line items including GST, preview and download as PDF

steps.caption: Step 1: Open Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses
steps.description: Open Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses
steps.narration: Let's start by opening Zoho Invoice - free online invoicing tool for businesses. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

steps.caption: Step 2: Open the free invoice generator page - no login required
steps.description: Open the free invoice generator page - no login required
steps.narration: Next, we open the free invoice generator page - no login required. It gives the walkthrough a clean starting point before the real automation work begins.

steps.caption: Step 3: Enter business details: company name, contact, and address
steps.description: Enter business details: company name, contact, and address
steps.narration: From there, we enter business details: company name, contact, and address. A little data entry here saves the same keystrokes on every future run.

steps.caption: Step 4: Enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International
steps.description: Enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International
steps.narration: Now we enter Bill To details for Acme Corp International. A little data entry here saves the same keystrokes on every future run.

steps.caption: Step 5: Set invoice number to INV-2026-001
steps.narration: After that, we set invoice number to INV-2026-001. Being explicit here keeps reruns consistent.

steps.caption: Step 6: Add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST
steps.description: Add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST
steps.narration: Next, we add line item 1 with quantity, rate, and GST. It is a nice reminder that the workflow can grow without turning brittle.

steps.caption: Step 7: Add line item 2: UI/UX Design services
steps.description: Add line item 2: UI/UX Design services
steps.narration: From there, we add line item 2: UI/UX Design services. It is a nice reminder that the workflow can grow without turning brittle.

steps.caption: Step 8: Add line item 3: annual server hosting
steps.description: Add line item 3: annual server hosting
steps.narration: Now we add line item 3: annual server hosting. It is a nice reminder that the workflow can grow without turning brittle.

steps.caption: Step 9: Add payment notes and terms for the client
steps.description: Add payment notes and terms for the client
steps.narration: After that, we add payment notes and terms for the client. It is a nice reminder that the workflow can grow without turning brittle.

steps.caption: Step 10: Review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
steps.description: Review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total
steps.narration: Next, we review subtotal, GST breakdown, and grand total. This is where the screen starts telling a story instead of just showing raw numbers.

steps.caption: Step 11: Use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF
steps.description: Use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF
steps.narration: From there, we use Download/Print to export the invoice as PDF. This is the moment where the walkthrough turns into something practical.

steps.caption: Step 12: Tutorial complete - create professional GST invoices in minutes
steps.description: Tutorial complete - create professional GST invoices in minutes
steps.narration: And that is the finish line. The flow is now captured end to end and ready to replay or adapt.
